reviews.comment:
Los baños un desastre, tiren todo y haganlos de nuevo!!!! Hace años que paso alli y siempre igual, obvio los debe usar todo el pueblo asi que a ponerle llave a las puertas😭😭

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms are a disaster, tear them all down and rebuild them!!!! I've been going there for years and it's always the same, obviously the whole town must use them so they should lock the doors 😭😭
